CustomField.description: Sum of Form_Section__c.Max_Score__c for active sections in this template — the maximum achievable Linked_Form__c.Score__c. Denormalized for read perf and snapshotted onto Linked_Form__c.Max_Score__c at submission time so historical responses keep their original max even if the template is re-weighted later. Populated by the snapshot writer.
CustomField.label: Max Score
